subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, the King, the Manifest Justice, unto him who hath been guided by the guidance of the Spirit and hath turned toward the Sanctuary [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله الملک العدل المبین الی الذی اهتدی بهدی الروح و توجه الی شطر
subcodes.subjects: @martyrdom of the Bab, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
